text:
On Mon, Jan 28, 2008 at 11:57:41PM +0000, Diego Rocha wrote:
> >Number:         120106
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       UPDATE PORTS
> >Confidential:   no

When you submit a PR, can you please add the category and portname
in the synopsis and, since you are the maintainer, set the class
to "maintainer-update" ?

Edwin
